title: stelis aequoris
intro: Stelis aequoris, also known as the Orchid Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant is rich in bioactive compounds, particularly flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known for their medicinal properties. The Stelis aequoris has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, making it easily accessible for herbal remedies, and its extracts have been studied for potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
